title: State and Federal Revenue Sources: Federal
description: Federal funding plays an important role in supporting Conroe ISD programs and services, and this policy outlines how the district receives and manages money from federal sources. It ensures the district follows federal rules when accepting and spending those funds, which can support things like special education, free and reduced-price meals, and assistance for students from low-income families. Families and community members benefit from knowing that federal dollars are being used responsibly and in compliance with the law.
